title: PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT - 211info
text: CORVALLIS DAY TREATMENT PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated intensive therapeutic services and education including medication management, skills training, academic instruction, individual and family therapy, as well as 24/7 crisis response for families. 4455 NE Highway 20 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Ages 5-18 who have behavioral and/or mental health condition that interfere with their ability to learn in a school environment Hours: Normal school hours with an extended calendar Email (541) 757-1852 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 757-1852 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: OHP members must be referred by their Family Care coordinator, wraparound coordinator, or other OHP representative. Call the Access Department for more information or to make a referral. FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, Marion, and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Reception: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: Psychiatric Day Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - SUBACUTE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
